title: Deploy band-site 1.4.2
text: Nate pushed band-site version 1.4.2 with the new shows page.

title: Monitor alert: Site latency high
text: Latency briefly spiked after the shows page went up. Acked by jordan.mcdaniel@gmail.com.

title: Monitor recovered: Site latency high
text: Latency back to normal on the band site.

title: Node reboot creek-node-1
text: Nate rebooted creek-node-1 for kernel updates. Acked by jordan.mcdaniel@gmail.com.

title: Deploy band-site 1.3.0
text: Nate stood up the first band-site build with the home and about pages.

title: Deploy band-site 1.3.1
text: Nate pushed a small fix for the mobile menu on the band site.

title: Monitor alert: Band site down
text: timbercreekband.com stopped responding during the host provider maintenance window.

title: Monitor recovered: Band site down
text: Site back up after the provider maintenance finished.

title: Deploy band-site 1.3.2
text: Added the gig calendar embed for the winter shows.

title: Node maintenance creek-node-2
text: Nate patched nginx on creek-node-2. Acked by jordan.mcdaniel@gmail.com.

title: Monitor alert: Disk space low
text: Media proxy cache filled the disk on creek-node-1.

title: Monitor recovered: Disk space low
text: Cleared old media cache, disk back under threshold.

title: Deploy band-site 1.4.0
text: Nate rolled out the new gallery of live photos from the fall gigs.

title: Monitor alert: Node CPU high
text: Image resizing spiked CPU on creek-node-2 during a traffic bump.

title: Deploy band-site 1.4.1
text: Small copy fixes on the bio page.

title: Monitor recovered: Node CPU high
text: CPU back to normal on creek-node-2 after traffic settled.

title: SSL cert renewed timbercreekband.com
text: Nate renewed the TLS certificate for the band site.

title: Deploy band-site 1.4.3
text: Wired the shows page to pull dates from the calendar feed automatically.

title: Node reboot creek-node-2
text: Nate rebooted creek-node-2 after the memory update. Acked by jordan.mcdaniel@gmail.com.

title: Deploy band-site 1.4.4
text: Added a contact form so bars can reach the band about booking.
